levels.name: discoverability
levels.description: Can a cold-start agent find this component and understand what it does?

checks.description: Registry contains an entry with name = mcp_server_per_hosting_provider
Component entry has a non-empty data_url field
mcp_servers_under_test.json is publicly accessible from the registry
verify.js is present in the repo

levels.name: endpoint_availability
levels.description: Each MCP server responds to a tools/list request with HTTP 200

checks.description: Each endpoint responds to POST tools/list with HTTP 200 — one check per provider

levels.name: endpoint_integrity
levels.description: Each responding endpoint returns exactly 1 tool named get_mcp_client_ip

checks.description: Each endpoint returns exactly 1 tool — one check per provider
The tool is named get_mcp_client_ip — one check per provider

levels.name: endpoint_execution
levels.description: Each endpoint executes get_mcp_client_ip and returns a valid response

checks.description: tools/call get_mcp_client_ip returns HTTP 200 — one check per provider
Response contains mcp_client_ip (non-null) and hosting_provider (matching provider name) — one check per provider
